onClick: {{storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', true); storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', 'Refreshing the current mailout bundle...'); GenerateOnly.run(() => { storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', 'Captain mailout bundle refreshed.'); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); }, (error) => { const message = `Error: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); });}}
